metadata.name: Dispatch Fuel Truck to Retail Station

description: A dispatcher receives a low inventory alert from a gas station and must dispatch a fuel truck to prevent a stock-out.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the low inventory alert for unleaded gasoline at station #5432.
Find the nearest available truck and check that it has enough of the required fuel grade.

expected_outcome.expected: An available and suitable truck is identified.

nodes.task_description: Create a delivery order and dispatch the truck to the retail station.

expected_outcome.expected: The truck is dispatched with the correct order details.
